phases.name: Pre-engagement Interactions
phases.description: Define scope, rules of engagement, objectives, and logistics with the client.

techniques.name: Scope Definition
techniques.description: Document in/out-of-scope targets, IP ranges, domains, apps, users.

techniques.name: Rules of Engagement
techniques.description: Agree testing windows, allowed techniques, emergency contacts, evidence handling.

techniques.name: Goals and Objectives
techniques.description: Capture business goals (compliance, red-team sim, breach reproduction).

techniques.name: Authorization
techniques.description: Obtain signed letter of authorization with dates, scope, and signatories.

techniques.name: Communications Plan
techniques.description: Establish secure channel, status cadence, incident escalation path.

phases.name: Intelligence Gathering
phases.description: Collect information about the target from open and technical sources.

techniques.name: OSINT Collection
techniques.description: Gather employees, tech stack, domains, emails from public sources.

techniques.name: Footprinting
techniques.description: Map external surface: DNS, subdomains, ASN, netblocks, TLS certs.

techniques.name: Active Reconnaissance
techniques.description: Port/service scans, banner grabs, web crawl, vuln scan (in-scope only).

techniques.name: Human Intelligence
techniques.description: Profile targets for social engineering (LinkedIn, conference talks, GitHub).

phases.name: Threat Modeling
phases.description: Identify assets and threat actors, align attack paths with business impact.

techniques.name: Business Asset Analysis
techniques.description: Rank data, systems, processes by business value to prioritize paths.

techniques.name: Threat Agent Analysis
techniques.description: Profile realistic adversaries (insider, criminal, nation-state) and motives.

techniques.name: Attack Path Modeling
techniques.description: Map plausible kill chains from external to crown-jewel assets.

techniques.name: Risk Prioritization
techniques.description: Weight paths by likelihood × impact to focus exploitation effort.

phases.name: Vulnerability Analysis
phases.description: Discover and validate flaws (technical and logical) that enable the attack paths.

techniques.name: Active Vulnerability Testing
techniques.description: Automated scans (nuclei, nmap NSE, Nessus) plus manual probing.

techniques.name: Passive Analysis
techniques.description: Traffic, metadata, config, code review without touching targets.

techniques.name: Validation
techniques.description: Confirm findings manually — remove false positives before exploitation.

techniques.name: Research
techniques.description: Lookup CVE, advisories, PoCs matching discovered versions.

phases.name: Exploitation
phases.description: Actively compromise systems to demonstrate impact; stay within agreed rules.

techniques.name: Precision Strike
techniques.description: Exploit validated vulnerability to gain initial access.

techniques.name: Countermeasure Bypass
techniques.description: Evade AV, WAF, EDR, IDS where rules of engagement permit.

techniques.name: Custom Exploit Development
techniques.description: Adapt public PoC or develop new exploit for target's version/config.

techniques.name: Social Engineering Execution
techniques.description: Phish, vish, physical — only if explicitly scoped.

phases.name: Post Exploitation
phases.description: Measure true business impact: persistence, lateral movement, data access, cleanup.

techniques.name: Infrastructure Analysis
techniques.description: Map internal network, AD, cloud trust, segmentation from foothold.

techniques.name: Pillaging
techniques.description: Harvest credentials, tokens, sensitive files, secrets in-scope only.

techniques.name: High-Value Target Identification
techniques.description: Chase crown-jewel systems defined in pre-engagement.

techniques.name: Persistence
techniques.description: Install controlled, reversible persistence to simulate dwell time.

techniques.name: Cleanup
techniques.description: Remove artifacts, accounts, beacons; document everything deployed.

phases.name: Reporting
phases.description: Deliver findings, evidence, and remediation guidance to technical and executive audiences.

techniques.name: Executive Summary
techniques.description: Non-technical overview: business risk, posture, top 3 priorities.

techniques.name: Technical Findings
techniques.description: Per-finding: severity, reproduction steps, evidence, CVSS, references.

techniques.name: Attack Narrative
techniques.description: Chronological story of the engagement showing full attack chain.

techniques.name: Remediation Guidance
techniques.description: Concrete, prioritized fixes (code, config, process) for each finding.

techniques.name: Debrief
techniques.description: Live walk-through with blue team + leadership; answer questions, plan retest.
